project.name: god-gragh
project.description: A high-performance, feature-rich Rust graph operations library with comprehensive algorithm support
project.goal: Achieve 10K+ daily downloads on crate.io through superior design, performance, and documentation

P1_core: Zero-cost abstractions - no runtime overhead for features you don't use
Type-safe API leveraging Rust's type system for compile-time graph correctness
Generic over node/edge data types with trait bounds for flexibility
Memory-efficient representations with optional arena allocation
Cache-friendly data layouts for optimal CPU performance
P2_architecture: Modular design with feature flags for minimal dependency footprint
Trait-based extensibility for custom graph types and algorithms
Comprehensive error handling with informative error types
No unsafe code unless absolutely necessary for performance
P3_ecosystem: Serde support for serialization (opt-in via feature flag)
Parallel algorithms via rayon (opt-in via feature flag)
Compatible with Rust's standard library collections
Clear migration path from petgraph and other libraries

hybrid_memory_layout.description: 混合内存布局：结合类 Arena 槽位管理和桶式邻接表格式的优势
hybrid_memory_layout.implementation_status: v0.2.0-alpha 已实现桶式邻接表变体，非传统 CSR

arena_like_nodes.purpose: 类 Arena 槽位管理，支持 O(1) 访问和稳定索引
features: generation 计数防止 ABA 问题
arena_like_nodes.note: 非独立 Arena 类型，而是将 Arena 思想集成到 Graph 结构体中

vec_edges.purpose: 边数据连续存储，支持 SIMD 优化

bucket_adjacency.purpose: 桶式邻接表格式存储邻接关系，支持 O(1) 增量更新
advantages: O(1) 增量边插入（push 到桶）
惰性删除（deleted_mask 位图标记）
按需压缩（compact() 回收空间）
64 字节对齐避免 false sharing
软件预取支持（条件编译 nightly）

comparison_to_traditional_csr.traditional: row_offsets/col_indices 格式，O(V+E) 空间，但不支持增量更新
comparison_to_traditional_csr.bucket_variant: 桶式结构，支持 O(1) 增量更新，但空间开销略高
comparison_to_traditional_csr.trade_off: 用少量空间换取增量更新能力，适合动态图场景
comparison_to_traditional_csr.naming_note: 代码中使用 CsrStorage 命名是历史原因，实际实现是桶式邻接表而非传统 CSR

achieved_optimizations: ✅ 软件预取（AdjBucketIter 条件编译支持 nightly）
✅ Flow 算法内存优化（O(V²) 邻接矩阵 → O(V+E) 邻接表）

parallel_strategies.description: 多层次并行策略，基于 rayon 实现

bfs_parallel.name: 分层并行 BFS
bfs_parallel.approach: 每层节点并行处理，层间同步

dfs_parallel.name: 子树并行 DFS
dfs_parallel.approach: 根节点的子树分配给不同线程
dfs_parallel.limitation: 并行度受限于分支因子

dijkstra_parallel.name: 并行松弛 Dijkstra
dijkstra_parallel.approach: 并行堆 + 批量松弛操作
dijkstra_parallel.status_note: ⚠️ v0.3.0-beta 中实现存在已知问题，标记为 experimental

pagerank_parallel.name: 迭代内并行 PageRank
pagerank_parallel.approach: 节点独立更新，无锁并行

connected_components_parallel.name: 并行 Union-Find
connected_components_parallel.approach: 路径压缩 + 按秩合并的并行版本

lock_usage.read_operations: 大部分无锁，支持并行读取
lock_usage.write_operations: 细粒度锁（Mutex/RwLock）保护共享数据
lock_usage.atomic_updates: 使用 AtomicUsize 等无锁原语更新计数器
lock_usage.note: v0.3.0-beta 中 par_dijkstra 使用 Mutex 保护桶和距离数据，存在锁竞争开销

cache_line_alignment.description: 64 字节对齐，避免 false sharing
cache_line_alignment.note: AdjBucket 结构体本身 64 字节对齐，但 Vec<AdjBucket> 存储的对齐依赖于 Vec 分配器。对于极高性能要求的场景，可考虑使用 Padded<AdjBucket> 包装

software_prefetching.description: 使用 prefetch 指令预取数据
software_prefetching.use_case: 遍历邻接表时预取下一批节点数据

strategies: 频繁访问的元数据单独存储
节点数据按访问模式重排
边数据按源节点排序存储

index_stability.description: 稳定索引设计，支持安全的节点/边删除

structure.index: usize - 在 Arena 中的槽位索引
structure.generation: u32 - 代数计数器，防止 ABA 问题

node_index.validation: 访问时检查 generation 是否匹配，不匹配则索引已失效

arena_implementation.slots: Vec<Slot<T>> - 每个槽位包含数据和代数
arena_implementation.free_list: Vec<usize> - 空闲槽位列表，支持 O(1) 复用

guarantees: 删除节点后，其他节点的 NodeIndex 保持有效
已删除节点的索引访问返回 Error 而非错误数据
索引在节点存活期间绝对稳定

iterator_safety.note: neighbors() 和 incident_edges() 迭代器在创建时获取目标节点的 generation，但迭代过程中如果图被修改，可能返回过时的 generation 信息
iterator_safety.recommendation: 迭代期间不要修改图结构，或在迭代后使用 get_node/get_edge 验证有效性

formal_crud_specification.description: 图结构元素 CRUD 操作的学术规范定义

mathematical_foundations.graph_definition: G = (V, E) 其中 V 为顶点集，E ⊆ V × V 为边集（有向图）或 E ⊆ {{u,v} | u,v ∈ V, u ≠ v} 为边集（无向图）
mathematical_foundations.edge_type: ∀e ∈ E, e = (u, v, d) 其中 u,v ∈ V, d ∈ E (泛型类型)

formal_definition.precondition: G = (V, E) 为当前图状态
formal_definition.postcondition: G' = (V ∪ {v_new}, E) 其中 data(v_new) = data

complexity.time: O(1) 摊销时间（Arena 分配）

create.rust_api: fn add_node(&mut self, data: T) -> Result<NodeIndex, GraphError>

formal_definition.postcondition: 返回 data(v) 其中 v 对应 idx

error_conditions: NodeDeleted: idx 指向已删除的节点（generation 不匹配）
read.rust_api: fn get_node(&self, idx: NodeIndex) -> Result<&T, GraphError>

update.signature: update_node(idx: NodeIndex, data: T) -> Result<T, GraphError>

formal_definition.postcondition: G' = (V, E) 其中 data'(v) = data, v 对应 idx

error_conditions: NodeDeleted: idx 指向已删除的节点
update.rust_api: fn update_node(&mut self, idx: NodeIndex, data: T) -> Result<T, GraphError>

complexity.time: O(deg(v)) 其中 deg(v) 为节点 v 的度数

error_conditions: NodeDeleted: idx 指向已删除的节点
delete.rust_api: fn remove_node(&mut self, idx: NodeIndex) -> Result<T, GraphError>
side_effects: 所有关联边被自动删除
邻接表 CSR 格式需要重建受影响行
NodeIndex 的 generation 递增，原索引失效

create.signature: add_edge(from: NodeIndex, to: NodeIndex, data: E) -> Result<EdgeIndex, GraphError>

formal_definition.precondition: from, to 为有效的 NodeIndex, from ≠ to（简单图）
formal_definition.postcondition: G' = (V, E ∪ {e_new}) 其中 e_new = (from, to, data)

complexity.time: O(1) 摊销时间（CSR 追加）

error_conditions: NodeNotFound: from ∉ V 或 to ∉ V
EdgeAlreadyExists: 简单图不允许重边
SelfLoopNotAllowed: from = to 且图不允许自环
create.rust_api: fn add_edge(&mut self, from: NodeIndex, to: NodeIndex, data: E) -> Result<EdgeIndex, GraphError>

formal_definition.postcondition: 返回 data(e) 其中 e 对应 idx

error_conditions: EdgeDeleted: idx 指向已删除的边
read.rust_api: fn get_edge(&self, idx: EdgeIndex) -> Result<&E, GraphError>

formal_definition.postcondition: 返回 (u, v) 其中 e = (u, v, _) 对应 idx

error_conditions: EdgeDeleted: idx 指向已删除的边
read_endpoints.rust_api: fn edge_endpoints(&self, idx: EdgeIndex) -> Result<(NodeIndex, NodeIndex), GraphError>

update.signature: update_edge(idx: EdgeIndex, data: E) -> Result<E, GraphError>

formal_definition.postcondition: G' = (V, E) 其中 data'(e) = data, e 对应 idx

error_conditions: EdgeDeleted: idx 指向已删除的边
update.rust_api: fn update_edge(&mut self, idx: EdgeIndex, data: E) -> Result<E, GraphError>

formal_definition.postcondition: G' = (V, E \ {e}) 其中 e 对应 idx

complexity.time: O(1) 摊销时间（标记删除 + 惰性清理）

error_conditions: EdgeDeleted: idx 指向已删除的边
delete.rust_api: fn remove_edge(&mut self, idx: EdgeIndex) -> Result<E, GraphError>
side_effects: CSR 格式中对应位置标记为已删除
EdgeIndex 的 generation 递增，原索引失效
定期触发 CSR 压缩重建以回收空间

formal_definition.postcondition: 返回 {v | (node, v) ∈ E}（有向图出边邻居）

complexity.space: O(1) 额外空间（惰性迭代器）

neighbors.rust_api: fn neighbors(&self, node: NodeIndex) -> impl Iterator<Item = NodeIndex> + '_

formal_definition.postcondition: 返回 {e | e = (node, v, _) ∈ E 或 e = (v, node, _) ∈ E}

complexity.space: O(1) 额外空间（惰性迭代器）

incident_edges.rust_api: fn incident_edges(&self, node: NodeIndex) -> impl Iterator<Item = EdgeIndex> + '_

formal_definition.precondition: from, to 为有效的 NodeIndex
formal_definition.postcondition: 返回 true 当且仅当 (from, to, _) ∈ E

has_edge.rust_api: fn has_edge(&self, from: NodeIndex, to: NodeIndex) -> bool

complexity.time: O(1) 从 CSR row_offsets 计算

degree.rust_api: fn degree(&self, node: NodeIndex) -> Result<usize, GraphError>

formal_definition.postcondition: 预分配容量，避免后续分配开销

reserve.rust_api: fn reserve(&mut self, additional_nodes: usize, additional_edges: usize)

iterator_guarantees.stability: 迭代器创建后，即使图被修改，迭代器仍按创建时的快照遍历
iterator_guarantees.lifetime: 迭代器生命周期与图的借用生命周期绑定
iterator_guarantees.parallel_safety: par_iter() 要求 T: Send + Sync, 支持多线程并行遍历

directed.description: Directed graphs with edges having direction (A→B)

edge_variants.weighted: Edges with generic weight type (i32, f64, custom types)
edge_variants.multi_edge: Multiple edges between same node pair allowed

node_features.generic_data: Any type T can be stored in nodes
node_features.stable_indices: Node indices remain valid after mutations (with optional storage)

specialized_graphs.bipartite: Two-set vertex graphs with edges only between sets
specialized_graphs.dag: Directed Acyclic Graph with cycle detection

Graph.description: Primary graph structure using adjacency list representation

fields.edge_count: usize - cached edge count for O(1) access

NodeIndex.description: Newtype wrapper around usize for type-safe node references

EdgeIndex.description: Newtype wrapper around usize for type-safe edge references

NodeRef/EdgeRef.description: Borrowed references to graph elements with lifetime tracking

dijkstra.name: Dijkstra's Algorithm
dijkstra.complexity: O((V + E) log V) with binary heap

rayon.note: Subset of parallel feature for iterator-only parallelism

unstable.description: Nightly Rust features for experimental optimizations

dot.description: DOT format export for Graphviz visualization

matrix.description: Matrix representation and linear algebra integration

src/.lib.rs: Root module, re-exports, feature flag configuration

graph/.traits.rs: Core graph traits (GraphBase, NodeRef, EdgeRef, etc.)
graph/.builders.rs: Fluent builder pattern for graph construction

GraphBase.description: Base trait defining minimal graph interface

methods: fn add_node(&mut self, data: T) -> NodeIndex
fn remove_node(&mut self, idx: NodeIndex) -> Option<T>
fn add_edge(&mut self, from: NodeIndex, to: NodeIndex, data: E) -> EdgeIndex
fn remove_edge(&mut self, idx: EdgeIndex) -> Option<E>
fn neighbors(&self, node: NodeIndex) -> impl Iterator
fn edges_directed(&self, node: NodeIndex, dir: Direction) -> impl Iterator
fn contains_edge(&self, from: NodeIndex, to: NodeIndex) -> bool

deliverables: Core Graph data structure with adjacency list
v0.1.0_alpha.success_criteria: Can construct graphs and perform basic traversal

v0.2.0_alpha.success_criteria: Core algorithms functional with good test coverage

strategies: Unit tests for every public function
Integration tests for common use cases
Doc comments with examples for all public items
Algorithm documentation with complexity and references
Memory layout optimization for cache efficiency
CI enforcement of fmt and clippy
Code review checklist for all PRs

actions: Build anticipation on r/rust with development updates
Create compelling README with benchmarks vs petgraph
Reach out to influencers in Rust community
Regular feature updates based on community feedback
Create example gallery showcasing use cases
Write follow-up blog posts on advanced features
Consider Rust Foundation grant for continued development

unique_selling_points: P11-level design with cutting-edge Rust patterns

performance_not_competitive.mitigation: Early and continuous benchmarking, profile-guided optimization
performance_not_competitive.contingency: Focus on niche where we excel (e.g., parallel algorithms)

api_breaking_changes.mitigation: Thorough design review before v1.0, use of newtype pattern

scope_creep.mitigation: Strict milestone adherence, feature freeze before v1.0
scope_creep.contingency: Move advanced features to v1.x roadmap

petgraph_dominance.mitigation: Clear differentiation, better DX, active community building

low_visibility.mitigation: Aggressive marketing, conference talks, blog posts
low_visibility.contingency: Partner with popular crates for integration

msrv_policy.description: Minimum Supported Rust Version policy for god-gragh

stable_msrv.guarantee: god-gragh 保证在 Stable Rust 1.85+ 上正常编译和运行

simd_feature.reason: `simd` 特性使用 `std::simd` 进行向量化计算，该功能仅在 nightly Rust 上可用
simd_feature.stable_fallback: 使用 stable Rust 编译时，SIMD 函数自动回退到普通并行实现，功能完整但性能略有下降

documentation.readme_section: README.md 中的特性标志表格明确标注 simd 需要 nightly

immediate_next_steps.action: Finalize Cargo.toml with proper metadata and feature flags
immediate_next_steps.details: Add authors, description, repository, license, keywords, categories

immediate_next_steps.action: Implement core Graph structure in src/graph/
immediate_next_steps.details: NodeIndex, EdgeIndex, Graph<T, E> with basic operations

immediate_next_steps.action: Add DFS and BFS traversal algorithms

immediate_next_steps.details: GitHub Actions with test, clippy, fmt, and benchmark jobs
README.md with getting started guide, basic examples
